zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Howard於1410年6月11日出生在英國諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 彼得時，她的父親John Howard26歲，母親Johanna Walton17歲。她於1425年8月31日與Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1475年12月25日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃享年65歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Howard于1410年6月11日出生在英国諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 彼得时，她的父亲John Howard26岁，母亲Johanna Walton17岁。她于1425年8月31日与Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1475年12月25日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃享年65岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Howard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Howard was born on 11 June 1410, in Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England, her father, John Howard, was 26 and her mother, Johanna Walton, was 17. She married Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford on 31 August 1425, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 25 December 1475, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in London, England.

fr.Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England: Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Howard est née le 11 juin 1410, à Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Howard, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Johanna Walton, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford le 31 août 1425, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 décembre 1475, à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre.

August 1425 in Essex, England Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Howard è nata il il 11 giugno 1410 nel Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England, sua padre, John Howard, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Johanna Walton, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford il 31 agosto 1425, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 dicembre 1475, nel Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Howardが1410年6月11日にイギリスノーフォルクウィグジェンハル スト ペターで生まれた時，父John Howardは26歳，母Johanna Waltonは17歳であった。1425年8月31日にイギリスエセックスでSir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1475年12月25日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンで65歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Howard(이)가 1410년 6월 11일 영국 노르폴크 위겐홀 스트 피터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Howard(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Walton(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1425년 8월 31일 영국 에세스에서 Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1475년 12월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Howard nasceu em 11 de junho de 1410, em Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Howard, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Walton, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford em 31 de agosto de 1425, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1475, em Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra.

ru.Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England: стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Howard родилась 11 июня 1410 г. в местности вигенолл ст питир, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Howard было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Walton, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford 31 августа 1425 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 25 декабря 1475 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.11 June 1410–25 December 1475: 11 de junio de 1410–25 de diciembre de 1475
es.Hedingham Castle, Essex, England: Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Hedingham Castle, Hedingham, Essex, Engl: Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England: Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Howard nació el 11 de junio de 1410, en Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Howard, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Johanna Walton, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford el 31 de agosto de 1425, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1475, en Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en London, Inglaterra.
